message: Added tests for 1 file (vida-numero-9.ts); interpretation-engine.ts already covered by existing interpretation-engine.test.ts (commit 348b4b39 covers MASTER_NUMBERS, VIDA_CONTENT, interpretarVida, interpretarVidaArea). New file: 6 tests, all pass (vitest 424ms, typecheck clean for target). Edge cases: VIDA_CONTENT[9] reference equality + type-level NumeroContent assignment. Committed: a50f0118
